upgrades.name: Island Rank Up 1
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Reach Rank 1.  Some upgrades and unlocks will not be available until you have ranked up.  You will also instantly learn several new warp-related crafting recipes.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission ascends you to a new rank.

Craft the Proof of Determination from experimental materials and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Reach Rank 1.  Some upgrades and unlocks will not be available until you have ranked up.  You will also instantly learn several new warp-related crafting recipes.

components.name: warp shards
components.tip: A small quantity of airy-thin material that resembles flaked obsidian. It glints with a purplish shimmer that seems to stretch off the bounds of itself and into the air itself. Offered to the powers that be, one could exchange it for valuable artifacts.

upgrades.name: Island Rank Up 2
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Reach Rank 2.  Some upgrades and unlocks will not be available until you have ranked up.  You will also instantly learn several new warp-related crafting recipes.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission ascends you to a new rank.

Craft the Proof of Determination from experimental materials and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Reach Rank 2.  Some upgrades and unlocks will not be available until you have ranked up.  You will also instantly learn several new warp-related crafting recipes.

components.name: warp shards
components.tip: A small quantity of airy-thin material that resembles flaked obsidian. It glints with a purplish shimmer that seems to stretch off the bounds of itself and into the air itself. Offered to the powers that be, one could exchange it for valuable artifacts.

upgrades.name: Construct: Climate Control
upgrades.effect: New Infrastructure: Climate Control.  Control the climate within the bunker so it's not too warm in the summer or too cold in the winter.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will instantly enhance the bunker on your home island.

Craft a Lukewarm Sphere from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Infrastructure: Climate Control.  Control the climate within the bunker so it's not too warm in the summer or too cold in the winter.

components.name: puffer jacket
components.tip: A down-filled jacket with deep pockets and a hood. Very warm.

components.name: down-filled blanket
components.tip: Hiding under here will not protect you from the monsters, but it'll keep you warm.

components.name: ski mask
components.tip: A warm wool mask that protects the head and face from the cold. It covers most of your head and mouth, and can be adjusted to hang around your throat instead.

components.name: umbrella
components.tip: An umbrella with a pointy end, useful for keeping dry when wielded.

components.name: telescoping umbrella (collapsed)
components.tip: A telescoping umbrella which has been collapsed down for easy storage. May be used to keep dry when extended and wielded.

components.name: swimsuit
components.tip: A simple swimsuit.

components.name: swimming trunks
components.tip: A pair of swimming trunks, with netting.

components.name: short bikini bottoms
components.tip: A very short pair of bikini bottoms, commonly called a thong.

components.name: bikini bottoms
components.tip: Simple bikini bottoms.

components.name: crop top
components.tip: A short-sleeved cotton shirt, cropped to expose the stomach.

components.name: large space heater
components.tip: A portable electric heater that steadily emits warm air. Raises temperature about 10 degrees Celsius, and fills a larger volume of air than the smaller version.

components.name: vehicle cooler
components.tip: A vehicle-mounted area cooler. Install a muffler in another part of the vehicle to direct the exhaust heat to that location.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Personal sunblock
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: The sun's rays cannot affect you while on the island.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Solar Refractor from sunglasses, glass and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: The sun's rays cannot affect you while on the island.

components.name: sunglasses
components.tip: A pair of sunglasses, good for keeping the glare out of your eyes.

components.name: corrective sunglasses
components.tip: A pair of sunglasses for keeping the glare out of the eyes of those who are near-sighted.

components.name: bifocal sunglasses
components.tip: A pair of bifocal sunglasses for keeping the glare out of the eyes of those who are both near-sighted and far-sighted.

components.name: reading sunglasses
components.tip: A pair of sunglasses for keeping the glare out of the eyes of those who are far-sighted. Useless for anyone else.

components.name: fit-over sunglasses
components.tip: A pair of fit-over sunglasses designed to be worn over a pair of corrective glasses. Good for keeping the glare out of your eyes.

components.name: sunglasses
components.tip: A pair of sunglasses, good for keeping the glare out of your eyes.

components.name: corrective sunglasses
components.tip: A pair of sunglasses for keeping the glare out of the eyes of those who are near-sighted.

components.name: bifocal sunglasses
components.tip: A pair of bifocal sunglasses for keeping the glare out of the eyes of those who are both near-sighted and far-sighted.

components.name: reading sunglasses
components.tip: A pair of sunglasses for keeping the glare out of the eyes of those who are far-sighted. Useless for anyone else.

components.name: fit-over sunglasses
components.tip: A pair of fit-over sunglasses designed to be worn over a pair of corrective glasses. Good for keeping the glare out of your eyes.

components.name: umbrella
components.tip: An umbrella with a pointy end, useful for keeping dry when wielded.

components.name: telescoping umbrella (collapsed)
components.tip: A telescoping umbrella which has been collapsed down for easy storage. May be used to keep dry when extended and wielded.

components.name: sundress
components.tip: A light and breezy cotton dress.

components.name: glass shard
components.tip: A broken shard of glass covered in sharp edges. You could use it as a weapon, but you might want to wear gloves.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Personal Radiation Shield
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Radiation cannot affect you while on the island.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Focused Scrubber from janitor supplies.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Radiation cannot affect you while on the island.

components.name: bleach
components.tip: Sodium hypochlorite, a common household cleaning agent.

components.name: broom
components.tip: A long-handled broom. Makes a terrible weapon unless you're chasing cats.

components.name: mop
components.tip: An unwieldy mop. Good for cleaning up spills. Use to mop up any 'mess' you may have made.

components.name: collapsible mop
components.tip: A long, unwieldy mop with a collapsible handle for convenient transportation. You may use it to clean up any 'mess' you have made.

components.name: detergent powder
components.tip: A popular pre-Cataclysm washing powder.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Personal windblock
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: The winds cannot affect you while on the island.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Wind Redirector from wind-blocking clothes and creams.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: The winds cannot affect you while on the island.

components.name: windbreaker
components.tip: A light synthetic jacket with a hood. Not very warm, but will keep out the rain.

components.name: Autobiography of a Mountain Man
components.tip: An amusing historical novel filled with detailed descriptions of surviving in the wild, potentially containing great insights for an experienced outdoorsman.

components.name: heavy cream
components.tip: Cream that has been skimmed from the top of raw milk left to sit.

components.name: moisturizer
components.tip: A cosmetic preparation used for protecting, moisturizing, and lubricating the skin.

components.name: Bristol Cream
components.tip: A fine sherry that has been aged in American oak casks and bottled in Bristol, England.

components.name: Any Tallow (any)
components.tip: 1 tallow OR 1 mutant tallow OR 1 human tallow OR 1 mutant humanoid tallow OR 1 demihuman tallow

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Island-Side Resilience
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Your speed cannot be below its default while on the island.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft an Unyielding Sinew from fibers and cables.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Your speed cannot be below its default while on the island.

components.name: jumper cable
components.tip: A 3-foot (or about 1 m) jumper cable: a short multi-stranded copper cable with power leads on either end. Attach one end to one vehicle and the other to another, and you can transfer electrical power between the two. Can also link power grids.

components.name: heavy-duty jumper cable
components.tip: A long, thick, heavy-duty jumper cable with power leads on either end. Attach one end to one vehicle and the other to another, and you can transfer electrical power between the two, though you expect the power loss would be noticeable. Can also link power grids.

components.name: heavy-duty tow cable
components.tip: An extremely heavy-duty 30-foot (or about 9 m) tow cable made from thick steel wire coated in plastic. If attached to a vehicle, it could be used to pull another vehicle of any weight.

components.name: sinew
components.tip: A tough sinew cut from a corpse, usable as thread.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Personal temperature adjustement
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Temperature cannot affect you while on the island.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Climate Self-Injector from temperature-controlling devices and various parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Temperature cannot affect you while on the island.

components.name: thermal electric outfit
components.tip: A suit of thin thermal underwear that covers you from head to toe and is equipped with internal battery-powered heating elements. Use it to turn it on.

components.name: thermal electric suit
components.tip: A full-body suit of thin thermal underwear equipped with internal battery-powered heating elements. Use it to turn it on.

components.name: Internal Climate Control
components.tip: Throughout your body lies a network of thermal piping, which eases the effects of high and low ambient temperatures when activated.

components.name: Thermal Dissipation
components.tip: Powerful heatsinks and supermaterials are surgically woven into your flesh. While powered, this system will prevent heat damage up to 2000 degrees Fahrenheit. Note that this does not affect your internal temperature.

components.name: external climate control kit
components.tip: A collection of mismatched pipes, wires, and a central device that looks like an exotic micro controller. Almost looks like it could be used for some form of central cooling.

components.name: vehicle cooler
components.tip: A vehicle-mounted area cooler. Install a muffler in another part of the vehicle to direct the exhaust heat to that location.

components.name: condensor coil
components.tip: A compressor and fan that work together to cool down refrigerant.

components.name: evaporator coil
components.tip: A set of long, snakelike tubes for evaporating refrigerant.

components.name: vehicle heater
components.tip: Set of tubes, that move heat from the engine into the vehicle cabin, heating it up.

components.name: heating element
components.tip: A heating element, like the ones used in hotplates or kettles. Consists of nichrome wire surrounded by electrical insulator and placed inside a steel casing.

components.name: disconnected air compressor
components.tip: This durable tank is topped with a motor that will cram as much air into the tank as possible. Needs to be placed and plugged into a power source.

components.name: 1 L gold ingot
components.tip: A one-liter ingot of solid gold.

components.name: length of railroad track
components.tip: A heavy one-meter length of railroad track with a smooth top, liberated from a now-defunct rail line. Far too heavy to be useful for much as-is, but perhaps could be shaped into something with some metalworking skill, or cut down into an anvil if sawed in half first.

upgrades.name: Construct: Bunker Entrance
upgrades.effect: New Structure: Bunker Entrance.  A simple concrete entrance leading down into the lower levels of the island, including a small subterranean chamber.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft the Mouth of the Island from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: Bunker Entrance.  A simple concrete entrance leading down into the lower levels of the island, including a small subterranean chamber.

components.name: stick
components.tip: A respectable length of wood, just big enough to wrap your hand around. Makes a decent melee weapon.

components.name: long stick
components.tip: A straight section of wood, about eight feet long and a couple of inches in diameter. Makes a decent melee weapon, and can be broken into shorter pieces for crafting.

components.name: twig
components.tip: A small, slender branch. Makes passable firewood but is not useful for much else.

components.name: sharp rock
components.tip: A baseball-sized rock with a somewhat sharp edge that also chips in a semi-predictable way if struck. With the right skills, you could give it a better edge.

components.name: scrap metal
components.tip: A bulky assortment of small bits of scrap steel useful in all kinds of crafting.

components.name: withered plant
components.tip: A dead plant. Good for starting fires or making crude tailoring crafts.

upgrades.name: Construct: Main Room 1
upgrades.effect: New Structure: Main Room 1.  A hollow chamber beneath the island's center to serve as a multipurpose space, with tons of room to expand.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Miner's Cameo from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: Main Room 1.  A hollow chamber beneath the island's center to serve as a multipurpose space, with tons of room to expand.

components.name: plank
components.tip: A flat, thick plank of wood, like a 2 by 4 or similar piece of dimensional lumber. Makes a decent melee weapon if you're desperate, and can be used for all kinds of construction projects.

components.name: hinge
components.tip: A small metal hinge with two metal plates with screw holes. Useful for making doors or chests.

components.name: nut and bolt
components.tip: A matching nut and bolt. Useful for securing objects together.

components.name: cardboard box
components.tip: A sturdy cardboard box, about the size of a banana box. Great for packing. Can be folded.

components.name: large cardboard box
components.tip: A very large cardboard box, the sort children would have loved to hide in, when there were still children. Can be folded.

components.name: oversize cardboard box
components.tip: An oversize cardboard box, big enough to fit some longer items. Great for storage. Can be folded.

components.name: Cordage (any)
components.tip: 1 long string OR 1 long cordage piece OR 1 long leather lace OR 6 short strings OR 6 short cordage pieces OR 6 short leather laces

upgrades.name: Construct: Main Room 2
upgrades.effect: New Structure: Main Room 2.  Expand the central room to fit more loot, furniture, or anything else you may need.

components.name: shovel
components.tip: A digging tool. Use it to dig pits adjacent to your location.

components.name: snow shovel
components.tip: A sturdy metal shovel used for picking up snow and moving it somewhere else. It was useful before the Cataclysm, but now it's useless.

components.name: sheet metal
components.tip: A thin sheet of metal.

components.name: steel frame
components.tip: A metal framework. Other vehicle components can be mounted on it, and it can be attached to other frames to increase the vehicle's size.

components.name: Cordage (any)
components.tip: 1 long string OR 1 long cordage piece OR 1 long leather lace OR 6 short strings OR 6 short cordage pieces OR 6 short leather laces

upgrades.effect: New Structure: Main Room 3.  Expand the central room to very generous dimensions.

components.name: heavy wooden beam
components.tip: An enormous beam of solid wood, very heavy and hard to lug around, but also very sturdy for construction. You could saw or chop it into smaller pieces, like planks or panels.

components.name: sheet metal
components.tip: A thin sheet of metal.

components.name: steel frame
components.tip: A metal framework. Other vehicle components can be mounted on it, and it can be attached to other frames to increase the vehicle's size.

components.name: headlamp
components.tip: An LED headlamp with an adjustable strap so as to be comfortably worn on your head or attached to your helmet. Use it to turn it on.

components.name: hard plating
components.tip: A piece of very thick vehicle armor plating made of tempered steel. Can be used as a makeshift anvil.

components.name: steel plating
components.tip: A piece of vehicle armor plating made of steel.

components.name: car battery
components.tip: A 12 V lead-acid battery used to power car electrical systems. Can also be plugged into a static power grid.

components.name: motorbike battery
components.tip: A 12 V lead-acid battery used to power smaller vehicles' electrical systems.

components.name: medium storage battery
components.tip: A medium storage battery containing multiple lithium-ion cells. Can be plugged into a static power grid.

components.name: Cordage (any)
components.tip: 1 long string OR 1 long cordage piece OR 1 long leather lace OR 6 short strings OR 6 short cordage pieces OR 6 short leather laces

upgrades.name: Construct: Main Room 4
upgrades.effect: New Structure: Main Room 4.  Expand the central room to its maximum size.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will instantly build a new structure on your home island.

Craft a Cavernous Soul from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Structure: Main Room 4.  Expand the central room to its maximum size.

components.name: large storage battery
components.tip: A large storage battery containing many lithium-ion cells. Could be installed into a storage battery case for easy removal from a vehicle, or just welded straight in.

components.name: military composite plating
components.tip: A thick sheet of military-grade armor; the best bullet-stopper you can stick on a vehicle.

components.name: biosilicified chitin armor kit
components.tip: A piece of durable silica-coated chitin plating made for a vehicle.

components.name: chitin armor kit
components.tip: A piece of light chitin plating made for a vehicle.

components.name: heavy-duty frame
components.tip: A large, reinforced steel frame, used in military vehicle construction. Other vehicle components can be mounted on it, and it can be attached to other frames to increase the vehicle's size. Increased mass makes it more resistant to damage in collisions.

components.name: block and tackle
components.tip: A sturdy metal housing with a number of pulleys that can be used with a thick rope or a chain to gain mechanical advantage on a lift.

components.name: mannequin
components.tip: A figure of an adult human, as seen in the display case at the mall.

components.name: heavy duty pipe
components.tip: A section of steel pipe with very thick walls built to contain very high pressure, probably intended to be a part of industrial equipment.

components.name: set of heavy duty pipe fittings
components.tip: A loose assortment of very thick-walled steel pipe fittings - end caps, pipe junctions, and similar items. Probably intended to be a part of industrial equipment.

upgrades.name: Construct: Central Skylight 2
upgrades.effect: New Structure: Central Skylight 2.  A larger skylight above your main room, allowing more light to enter in.
upgrades.description:

components.tip: A strong adhesive to use for structural repairs or other high stress applications. You can't sniff it, but you can use it to close up wounds in a pinch.

components.tip: A full-length mirror mounted in a sleek aluminum frame. Metal stand is currently folded.

components.name: decorative plant seeds
components.tip: Some small decorative plant seeds, likely grass or flower. Don't expect them to be useful for anything other than dry plant material.

components.name: patchwork quilt

components.name: blanket
components.tip: Hiding under here will not protect you from the monsters.

components.tip: A heavy fur blanket that covers most of your body.

components.name: feather

components.tip: A fluffy down feather from a bird. Useful for making cozy bedclothes.

components.name: shot glass
components.tip: A standard 1.5 ounce shot glass.

components.name: spurge flowers
components.tip: A handful of yellow-green flowers. Can be brewed into a tea that prevents asthma attacks.

components.name: felt patch

components.tip: A fine glass tube with a bulb with a bowl on one end. It's used to partake of certain illicit substances.

components.tip: An impermeable whole-body garment worn as protection against hazardous materials. Restrictive and fragile, wearing it will provide complete protection against ambient radiation. It requires a separate gas mask for full protection.

components.tip: A full-body 3 mm thick neoprene wetsuit with nylon lining.

components.name: shark plushie
components.tip: A somewhat large, mass produced shark plushie. Meant to provide comfort to people of all ages.

components.name: eclipse glasses
components.tip: A pair of cardboard-framed glasses with UV and IR-filtered lenses topped with a layer of aluminum coating. They allow safe viewing of extremely bright and harmful sources of light, like the sun during a solar eclipse.

components.name: glass pipe
components.tip: A hand-blown glass pipe. It's commonly used to smoke recreational substances.

components.name: dahlia root
components.tip: The large, tuberous root of a dahlia flower. It smells spicy, but is too starchy to eat without cooking.

components.name: poppy bud
components.tip: A poppy bud. Contains some substances commonly produced by a mutated poppy flower.

components.name: faraday chainmail suit
components.tip: A fully customized chainmail suit that can be worn over your normal clothing. The suit is conductively interconnected with a cage covering the face, protecting against electricity.

components.name: fursuit
components.tip: A full-body fursuit in the form of an anthropomorphic animal. It is quite encumbering and has little storage but is very warm.

components.name: ō-yoroi
components.tip: An ornamental suit of Japanese samurai armor.

components.name: junk ornamental plate armor
components.tip: An extremely heavy suit of ornamental armor. The metal shows signs of rust and corrosion, and the leather straps are tattered.

components.name: warp shards

components.name: Fire When You See My Eyes
components.tip: In a cataclysmic future, advanced technology gives parents access to video footage of every moment of their teenage children's lives.

components.name: monocle
components.tip: An essential article of the gentleman's apparel. Also corrects near-sightedness. The concave lens diffuses the sunlight, rendering it useless for starting fires.

components.name: heroin
components.tip: An extremely strong opioid narcotic derived from morphine. Incredibly addictive, the risk of overdose is extreme, and the drug is contraindicated for nearly all medical purposes.

components.name: cocaine
components.tip: Crystalline extract of the coca leaf, or at least, a white powder with some of that in it. A topical analgesic, it is more commonly used for its stimulatory properties. Highly addictive.

components.name: pride flag
components.tip: A large rainbow flag, The colors reflect the diversity of the LGBT community and the spectrum of human sexuality and gender.

components.name: national flag
components.tip: A large flag, made to fly in even the worst conditions.

components.name: American flag
components.tip: A large American flag, made to fly in even the worst conditions.

components.name: state flag
components.tip: A large white flag with a shield featuring an American Native and a star which represents the state of Massachusetts.

components.name: warp shards

components.name: road map
components.tip: A road map for the local area. Listing information on civic sites like hospitals and police stations, it can be used to add points of interest to your map.

components.name: subway map
components.tip: A schematic diagram of local subway networks, too stylized to garter much useful information. Using it will add subway stations to your map.

components.name: survivor's map
components.tip: A hand-drawn map of the local area. Whoever created it has marked down the locations of nearby supply sources including gun stores and gas stations. Using it will add points of interest to your map.

components.name: trail guide
components.tip: A printed guide to the best local trails. It has general details about the trails, trailhead amenities, suggestions for the best thru-hikes, and advice on interacting with local wildlife in a responsible and respectful manner.

components.name: tourist guide
components.tip: This is glossy printed pamphlet for tourists that details local hotels and attractions.

components.name: restaurant guide
components.tip: This is glossy printed pamphlet that details dining establishments in the local area. Printed by the Chamber of Commerce, it lists the addresses of all the best diners and bars. Using it will add points of interest to your map.

components.name: handwritten note
components.tip: A small, meticulously folded piece of paper, filled with tiny handwriting and some surprisingly precise diagrams of subway tunnels, ventilation shafts, and… guard shifts? You have the feeling they weren't supposed to write any of this stuff down.

components.name: visitor's pass
components.tip: A visitor's pass to some sort of facility. The reverse side describes the protocol for using it; this could grant access at a card reader, if you can find one. It also lists the addresses of nearby facilities; activate it to add their locations to your map.

components.name: oxycodone
components.tip: A strong semi-synthetic narcotic used in the treatment of intense pain. Highly addictive.

components.name: tramadol
components.tip: A painkiller used to manage moderate pain. The effects last for several hours, but are relatively subdued for an opioid.

components.name: poppy painkiller
components.tip: A potent opioid palliative produced by the refining of the mutated poppy. Notably devoid of euphoric or sedative effects, but as an opiate it can still be addictive.

components.name: morphine
components.tip: A very strong, naturally-occurring narcotic used to treat intense pain in hospital settings. You'll need a syringe to inject it, and it's very addictive, so be careful.

components.name: warp shards
components.tip: A small quantity of airy-thin material that resembles flaked obsidian. It glints with a purplish shimmer that seems to stretch off the bounds of itself and into the air itself. Offered to the powers that be, one could exchange it for valuable artifacts.

components.name: thermal electric suit
components.tip: A full-body suit of thin thermal underwear equipped with internal battery-powered heating elements. Use it to turn it on.

components.name: puffer jacket
components.tip: A down-filled jacket with deep pockets and a hood. Very warm.

components.name: plastic jack o'lantern
components.tip: A plastic lantern that is painted to look like a pumpkin with a face. It has a tiny LED light inside, which is currently off. It's mostly for seasonal decoration and doesn't provide very much light.

components.name: bronze medal
components.tip: A medal awarded for achieving third place in some event. It might be worth something if it was made of bronze; this one is made from brass.

components.name: silver medal
components.tip: A medal awarded for achieving second place in some event. Before everything fell apart, this was likely a source of pride for its owner. Now it's just another shiny bauble.

components.name: gold medal
components.tip: A medal awarded for achieving first place in some event. Before everything fell apart, this was likely a source of great pride for its owner. Now it's just another shiny bauble.

components.name: service medal
components.tip: A medal awarded to military personnel for heroism, wounds suffered in combat, or distinguished service.

components.name: suit
components.tip: A full-body cotton suit. Makes the apocalypse a truly gentlemanly experience.

components.name: signet ring
components.tip: A gold and silver ring with a wide stamp attached to the band. A long time ago, the stamp was legible, but now the pattern is too worn to discern its former use.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Landing Boost: Waterwalking
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can walk on water.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Cloaking Buoyancy from things from water and things that float.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can walk on water.

components.name: makeshift flotation vest
components.tip: A flotation vest made of inflated animal skins.

components.name: flotation vest
components.tip: A brightly-colored vest designed to keep you upright and floating in water.

components.name: ō-yoroi
components.tip: An ornamental suit of Japanese samurai armor.

components.name: junk ornamental plate armor
components.tip: An extremely heavy suit of ornamental armor. The metal shows signs of rust and corrosion, and the leather straps are tattered.

components.name: flotation stone
components.tip: This smooth, whorled stone seems cool and wet to the touch, but when you take your hand off it your skin is perfectly dry. If you activate it, you will be able to walk on the surface of water for three minutes.

components.name: inflatable boat
components.tip: This rubber rowboat (with oars included) is deflated for storage. Activate it with an air pump in your inventory to inflate and launch it.

components.name: disconnected large water purifier
components.tip: A device that effectively sterilizes water, but it doesn't take batteries. You'll need to connect it to a power source.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Landing Boost: Flight
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can fly.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft an Inverted Gravity Bubble from things that used to fly and things that could make someone fly.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can fly.

components.name: cluster of gas sacs
components.tip: A cluster of membranous bubbles, each about the size of a grape, retrieved from inside a mutant insect. They float like tiny helium balloons - perhaps they are full of a lighter-than-air gas.

components.name: warp shards
components.tip: A small quantity of airy-thin material that resembles flaked obsidian. It glints with a purplish shimmer that seems to stretch off the bounds of itself and into the air itself. Offered to the powers that be, one could exchange it for valuable artifacts.

components.name: High and Low
components.tip: In this work of adolescent fiction, a young Gemini discovers that the astrology section of his small town newspaper is eerily preminiscent. His efforts to uncover the oracle reveal more than the stars could have predicted.

components.name: bird mutagenic primer
components.tip: A processed mutagenic primer the color of the pre-Cataclysmic skies.

components.name: feather
components.tip: A feather from a bird. Useful for fletching arrows.

components.name: down feather
components.tip: A fluffy down feather from a bird. Useful for making cozy bedclothes.

components.name: low-grade methamphetamine
components.tip: A profoundly addictive and powerful stimulant. While extremely effective at enhancing alertness, it is hazardous to health and the risk of an adverse reaction is great.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Landing Boost: Phasing
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can pass through non-thick walls.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft the Universal Access Pass from different tools granting access to restricted areas.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can pass through non-thick walls.

components.name: shifting keyring
components.tip: A smooth ring of steel, heavy under the weight of numerous keys. The designs of the keys change over time, but none will fit any keyhole you have ever found.

components.name: Probability Travel
components.tip: Increases your body's wavelength, allowing you to quantum tunnel through walls, reappearing on the other side. Power drain in standby is minimal, but each tile tunneled through costs 250 bionic power.

components.name: Teleportation Unit
components.tip: This highly experimental unit folds space over short distances, instantly transporting your body up to 25 feet at the cost of much power. Note that prolonged or frequent use may have dangerous side effects.

components.name: teleporter
components.tip: An experimental device that will teleport you a short distance when activated.

components.name: phase immersion suit
components.tip: Covered in interlocking plates of reflective metal, this advanced suit resembles both plate armor and an astronaut's spacesuit. Designed to protect its wearer during extradimensional excursions, it offers unparalleled environmental protection, both in this Earth and beyond. Use it to turn it on.

components.name: warp shards
components.tip: A small quantity of airy-thin material that resembles flaked obsidian. It glints with a purplish shimmer that seems to stretch off the bounds of itself and into the air itself. Offered to the powers that be, one could exchange it for valuable artifacts.

components.name: MIT Guide to Lock Picking
components.tip: A home-made booklet with large black-and-white pictures of several types of modern locks and general information on how to crack them open.

components.name: improvised lockpick
components.tip: An improvised pick and torsion wrench made from scrap metal. You'll need MacGyver-like skills to open locks with these as they are brittle, but they lower the chances of alarms being set off.

components.name: locksmith kit
components.tip: A locksmith's set of sturdy steel lockpicks and torsion wrenches. It is essential for silently and quickly opening locks, provided you have some lockpicking and mechanical skills.

components.name: mesh colander
components.tip: A stainless steel mesh colander, for washing rice and vegetables, or straining liquid off from noodles or other foods.

upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Reveals slightly more of the map around exit points and mission targets.

EFFECT: Reveals slightly more of the map around exit points and mission targets.

components.name: eyeglasses
components.tip: A pair of glasses for the near-sighted. The concave lenses diffuse the sunlight, rendering them useless for starting fires.

components.name: bifocal glasses
components.tip: A pair of bifocal glasses for those who are both near-sighted and far-sighted. You can use them to focus sunlight.

components.name: reading glasses
components.tip: A pair of glasses for the far-sighted. Useless for anyone else. You can use them to focus sunlight.

components.name: Any Pipe (any)
components.tip: 1 pipe OR 1 PVC pipe OR 1 copper tubing

components.name: wire
components.tip: A length of thin, relatively stiff steel wire. Like the sort you find in chain link fences.

components.name: Cordage Short (any)
components.tip: 1 short string OR 1 short cordage piece OR 1 short leather lace

components.name: binoculars
components.tip: A pair of optics with a neck strap attached. Useful for seeing long distances. Wearing this item or carrying it in your inventory will double the distance around you that is mapped during your travels. You could also use them to focus the sunlight.

components.tip: A small quantity of airy-thin material that resembles flaked obsidian. It glints with a purplish shimmer that seems to stretch off the bounds of itself and into the air itself. Offered to the powers that be, one could exchange it for valuable artifacts.

components.tip: A copper tube; too thin to be much use as a melee weapon, but will do if nothing else is available. Useful in a few crafting recipes.

components.name: duct tape
components.tip: A roll of incredibly strong tape. Its uses are innumerable.

components.name: light battery (disposable)

components.tip: A light battery cell, popular for any consumer-grade electronic: from remotes to mice, from clocks to thermometers. This one can't be recharged.

components.tip: A point-and-shoot digital camera with a digital viewfinder, a backup 'iron-sight', and flash. You can look at your photos on the digital screen, or transfer them with any standard electronic device.

components.name: professional camera
components.tip: A 35 mm digital SLR (single-lens reflex) camera with optical and digital viewfinders, a zoom lens with auto-focus and stabilizer, and flash. You can look at your photos on the digital screen or transfer them with any standard electronic device. Before the Cataclysm, you could have taken professional-grade photos using …

components.name: wearable camera
components.tip: A point-and-shoot digital camera with a digital viewfinder, a backup 'iron-sight', and flash. You can look at your photos on the digital screen, or transfer them with a memory card. This one can be worn over your neck.

components.name: wearable professional camera
components.tip: A 35 mm digital SLR (single-lens reflex) camera with optical and digital viewfinders, a zoom lens with auto-focus and stabilizer, and flash. You can view your photos on it or transfer them with a memory card. Before the Cataclysm, you could have taken professional-grade photos using this. This one can be worn over your…

components.name: security camera
components.tip: A security camera you could connect to a display. Image quality is quite low, but the field of vision is great.

components.name: warp shards
components.tip: A small quantity of airy-thin material that resembles flaked obsidian. It glints with a purplish shimmer that seems to stretch off the bounds of itself and into the air itself. Offered to the powers that be, one could exchange it for valuable artifacts.

components.name: scrap aluminum
components.tip: A handful of small pieces of aluminum, usable for crafting or repairs.

components.name: strong glue
components.tip: A strong adhesive to use for structural repairs or other high stress applications. You can't sniff it, but you can use it to close up wounds in a pinch.

components.name: weak glue
components.tip: A weak adhesive to use in arts & crafts or other low stress applications. You can't eat it.

components.name: medium battery
components.tip: A medium battery cell, wildly used in modern tools: heavy flashlights, two-way radios, security cameras, multiple of them make a tool battery, and some older generation of EV use thousands of this as the power storage.

components.name: extension cord
components.tip: A long 30-foot (or about 10 m) orange extension cord for extending cables or connecting appliances. Could be used on any appliance or other household electrical system.

components.name: outdoor extension cord
components.tip: An extra-long 100-foot (or about 30 m) orange extension cord for extending cables or connecting outdoor appliances. Could be used on any appliance or other household electrical system.

components.name: jumper cable
components.tip: A 3-foot (or about 1 m) jumper cable: a short multi-stranded copper cable with power leads on either end. Attach one end to one vehicle and the other to another, and you can transfer electrical power between the two. Can also link power grids.

Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

EFFECT: Reveals a lot of the map around exit points and mission targets.

components.name: high-quality lens
components.tip: A high-quality glass lens, useful for focusing or diffusing light. Might be useful for starting a fire.

components.name: small high-quality lens
components.tip: A small, high-quality glass lens, useful for focusing or diffusing light. Might be useful for crafting.

components.name: warp shards
components.tip: A small quantity of airy-thin material that resembles flaked obsidian. It glints with a purplish shimmer that seems to stretch off the bounds of itself and into the air itself. Offered to the powers that be, one could exchange it for valuable artifacts.

components.name: microscope
components.tip: A classic tool for the ages! This hefty, durable piece of lab equipment makes small things look bigger. When powered, it allows the user to observe various samples on a microscopic scale.

components.name: silver
components.tip: A soft, shiny metal. Before the Cataclysm it was worth quite a bit, but its value is now greatly diminished.

components.name: brazing rod

components.name: aluminum brazing rod

components.name: radio (off)

components.name: Protective Lenses
components.tip: Your eye sockets have been surgically sealed with highly protective mirrored lenses and your tear ducts have been re-routed to your mouth. When you cry, you must spit out or swallow your tears.

components.name: Integrated AR System
components.tip: Extremely thin lenses provide user with augmented reality overlay allowing the user to zoom, and it displays handy information about local topology.

components.name: Ocular Amplifiers
components.tip: Your vision is greatly enhanced, giving you a +2 bonus to perception while powered. However, you suffer penalties while unpowered.

components.name: Infrared Vision
components.tip: Your range of vision extends into the infrared, allowing you to see warm-blooded creatures in the dark or through smoke.

components.name: Implanted Night Vision
components.tip: When active, this bionic will amplify existing light, allowing you to see in the dark.

components.name: steroid eyedrops

components.name: saline eye drops

components.name: Magic 8-Ball

components.name: lump of steel

components.tip: This paper notebook is mostly full of boring logs, experimental observations and notes. Mixed in, however, are musings on how to use the lab's vapor deposition machine to deposit amorphous carbon in a diamond-like form onto common metals. The author's intended goal was a better non-stick frying pan, but you can think o…

components.name: acetylene torch
components.tip: A compact tool kit intended for welding and cutting metal, this portable oxygen-acetylene torch includes a torch handle and cutting attachment in an easy-to-carry tote. It needs to be connected to a pressurized cylinder of an appropriate welding gas before use. In addition to its metalworking uses, you can activate it …

components.name: tiny welding tank
components.tip: A tiny acetylene tank. It can pressurize up to 1 liter of welding gas.

components.name: welding tank
components.tip: A bulky B size acetylene tank. It can pressurize up to 40 cubic feet of welding gas.

components.name: Mutation Withdrawal
components.tip: You've gotten a taste for mutating and the chemicals that cause it. But you can stop, yeah, any time you want.

components.name: mutagenic catalyst
components.tip: A processed, purified, and condensed dose of mutagenic drugs. When combined with mutagenic primer, this will cause mutations over time.

components.name: jackhammer
components.tip: A construction tool for breaking horizontal surfaces. This model runs on gasoline.

components.name: electric jackhammer
components.tip: A construction tool for breaking horizontal surfaces. This model has a cord compatible with a UPS.

upgrades.name: Unlock: Challenge Mode
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: You will be able to enable a challenge mode for expeditions, applying a random modifier in exchange for increased rewards.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft an Eternal Obelisk from weapons and armor.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: You will be able to enable a challenge mode for expeditions, applying a random modifier in exchange for increased rewards.

components.name: warp shards
components.tip: A small quantity of airy-thin material that resembles flaked obsidian. It glints with a purplish shimmer that seems to stretch off the bounds of itself and into the air itself. Offered to the powers that be, one could exchange it for valuable artifacts.

components.name: semi-automatic anti-materiel rifle
components.tip: A mahoosive rifle of military pedigree, fitted with a telescopic gun scope peeking over its giant cocking mechanism and resting upon a bipod to control recoil from the equally big .50-caliber munitions it is designed for. Originally employed for detonating unexploded ordnance in combat conditions and defeating light ve…

components.name: .50-caliber heavy machine gun
components.tip: Essentially a giant steel box with a long barrel peering from one end and dual spade grips mounted upon the other, this venerable machine gun design served the United States military since the First World War, mounted on everything from tanks to patrol boats to aircraft, and even tripod-mounted for stand-alone use. Par…

components.name: .50-caliber precision rifle
components.tip: Pin-point accurate out to one and a half kilometers and cycling its .50-caliber feed from detachable, 10-round magazines, this combat sniper's weapon provides users with a comfortable window to engage targets at a distance. Its imposing bullets ensure that it is more than capable of delivering an adequate account of it…

components.name: activity suit
components.tip: A single-piece brown and orange environmental suit, tailored in a way that slightly recalls a military flight suit. The letters "X.E.D.R.A" are inscribed on its back, and a white shoulder patch on the right arm shows an arrow reaching within rings of concentric circles. It requires a separate gas mask for full protecti…

components.name: activity suit (casual)
components.tip: A single-piece brown and orange environmental suit, tailored in a way that slightly recalls a military flight suit. The upper portion has been tied around the waist casually.

components.name: yellow post-it note
components.tip: A bright post-it note.

components.name: biology protocol
components.tip: A sheet of paper adorned with an atom-and-flask symbol, detailing some questionable biological research.

components.name: metatopography protocol
components.tip: A sheet of paper bearing an atom-and-flask symbol, filled with incoherent ramblings about alien geometries and how to get to them.

components.name: psychotherapy protocol
components.tip: A sheet of paper bearing an atom-and-cross symbol, pertaining to the mental wellbeing of science staff.

components.name: security protocol
components.tip: A sheet of paper bearing an atom-and-rifle symbol, detailing some very particular security protocols.
